reasons: Luo Yi adds a second map-movement tool on top of Chip's portal system.
After Chip creates a portal collapse, Luo Yi can punish grouped enemies with Yin-Yang Reaction pull and stun.

proof.summary: Chip creates portal access into a fight, while Luo Yi adds another teleport layer and pull/stun follow-up after enemies are grouped.
worksBestWhen: The team communicates whether Chip Shortcut or Luo Yi Diversion starts the play.
Luo Yi prepares Yin/Yang marks before the portal fight begins.
Teammates enter together instead of one by one.
failureCases: Luo Yi and Chip choose different fight locations.
The team arrives without damage cooldowns ready.

reasons: Zetian reveals enemy positions, helping Chip choose a portal target.
Her global control and allied movement support make Chip's portal timing easier to convert into a collapse.

proof.summary: Zetian reveals and briefly controls enemies globally, while Chip converts that information into a portal engage.
worksBestWhen: Zetian casts ultimate before Chip chooses the Shortcut target.
Chip targets an isolated or objective-side enemy.
failureCases: Zetian's global window ends before teammates arrive.
The team enters the portal without coordination.

reasons: Yi Sun-shin gives Chip global enemy-location information before Chip commits Shortcut.
Chip can use the reveal to choose safer objective-side or isolated portal targets.

proof.summary: Yi Sun-shin reveals enemy positions, while Chip uses that information to choose a safer portal-collapse target.
worksBestWhen: Yi Sun-shin reveals before Chip casts Shortcut.
The revealed target is isolated or near an objective.
failureCases: Chip waits too long after the reveal.
The revealed target has backup nearby.
Teammates cannot enter the portal quickly enough.

reasons: Claude can convert Chip's portal collapse into Blazing Duet AoE damage.
Claude's repositioning tools help him enter and reset around Chip's portal fight.

proof.summary: Chip creates the portal fight, while Claude follows with mobile AoE marksman damage.
worksBestWhen: Claude has Blazing Duet and Battle Mirror Image ready.
Chip targets a fight where Claude will not be instantly controlled.
failureCases: The portal places Claude inside hard crowd control.

reasons: Yu Zhong can start deep disruption, and Chip can bring the rest of the team to finish the fight.
Chip helps Yu Zhong's backline pressure become a coordinated teamfight instead of a solo dive.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong disrupts deep targets, while Chip turns that disruption into a team arrival point.
worksBestWhen: Yu Zhong starts pressure before Chip opens the portal.
Teammates arrive together through Chip's portal.
failureCases: Yu Zhong and Chip target different areas.
